ampnestBook.metaDesc: View live charger occupancy and join the waitlist online. Download the AmpNest app for formal booking and more benefits.
ampnestBook.pageLead: Scan the QR code on your building's charger wall, or enter your invite code. We recommend the app for full booking and member benefits.
ampnestBook.rightsBanner: Web users can only join the waitlist — not formal bookings. You are notified after all App users;
ampnestBook.nameLookupHint: If you booked on the web, enter your name to cancel here. Records are saved on this browser.
ampnestBook.waitlistDesc: When the spot opens and all App users have been notified, you will get a browser push alert. One spot per device.
ampnestBook.pushRequiredForWaitlist: Browser push permission is required to join the waitlist.
ampnestBook.waitlistFreeDesc: Free spots are reserved for App users. Allow browser notifications before joining the waitlist — we will push when it is your turn.
ampnestBook.waitlistOnePerDevice: This device already has a waitlist spot — leave it first.
ampnestBook.webCantBookBooked: This spot is booked by an App user — web waitlist is not available.
ampnestBook.waitlistSuccess: Added to waitlist! You will be notified via browser push when it is your turn.
ampnestBook.myWaitlistHint: Saved on this browser. Notifications: browser push only. You are notified after all App users.
ampnestBook.enterCodeDesc: Find the code on the poster next to your building's chargers.
ampnestBook.noSpots: No chargers found. Check the QR code or ask your building admin.
ampnestBook.name: Name
ampnestBook.phoneOptional: Optional — SMS reminders if you prefer texts over push
ampnestBook.pushDesc: Allow browser notifications — we'll alert you when a spot opens.
ampnestBook.pushDeniedHint: Notifications blocked. Enable in browser settings, or use optional SMS below.
ampnestBook.footerNote: Scan to waitlist · Push reminders · Download the app for more
ampnestBook.needPhone: Please enter your phone for SMS reminders
ampnestBook.needTime: Please select start and end time
ampnestBook.invalidRange: End time must be after start time
ampnestBook.conflict: This time overlaps with another booking. Pick a different slot.
ampnestBook.bookedWithSms: Booked! Push reminder set; optional SMS sent if provided.
ampnestBook.bookedWithPush: Booked! We'll notify you before your slot and when spots open.
ampnestBook.myBookingsHint: Saved on this browser only — use the same device to cancel, or book again if you switched phones.
ampnestBook.cancelConfirm: Cancel this booking? The spot will be released for neighbors.
ampnestBook.cancelFailed: Could not cancel — refresh and try again
ampnestBook.cancelNotYours: You can only cancel bookings made on this device
ampnestBook.smsBody: AmpNest: {name}, spot {spot} booked for {time}. Reminder 10 min before start.

appsPage.metaDesc: Download our apps from the App Store and Google Play.
appsPage.title: Our apps
appsPage.lead: Tap a store link to install. More apps will appear here as we ship them.
appsPage.empty: No apps listed yet. Check back soon.
appsPage.notConfigured: App listings require Supabase. Ask the site owner to set NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL and the anon key.

home.metaTitle: FamilyMedVault — Family health records & emergency readiness
home.metaDesc: Organize family medical records, appointments, medications, and emergency health info in one secure place.
home.heroTitle: Your Family. Your Health. One Secure Place.
home.heroLead: Organize records, medications, appointments, referrals, and emergency health info for everyone you love.
bullets: AI health assistant — ask in plain language
Emergency card export for urgent care
home.featuresLead: Built for busy caregivers: fewer spreadsheets, fewer missed refills, faster answers before the doctor visit.

featuresItems.title: Secure records
featuresItems.desc: Store labs, imaging, prescriptions, and history.

featuresItems.title: Care coordination
featuresItems.desc: Track appointments and referrals in one place.

featuresItems.title: AI assistant
featuresItems.desc: Understand reports and prepare better questions.

featuresItems.title: Emergency ready
featuresItems.desc: Instant export for urgent care and travel.

featuresItems.title: Family sharing
featuresItems.desc: Parents, kids, and loved ones — permissions you control.

home.aiCreditsLead: Credits reset each subscription period (aligned with App Store billing); unused credits do not roll over. Different AI tasks cost different amounts — see below. Referral bonuses may apply in the app.
home.aiCreditsCosts: Examples: doctor visit prep = 1 credit; lab explanation = 3; symptom/medical summary = 5; long PDF/chart analysis = 10.
home.aiCreditsFree: Free: 10 credits per period — try core AI; long PDF analysis needs Premium+.
home.aiCreditsPremium: Premium: 300 credits per period — labs, visit prep, meds, summaries, and larger chart context.
home.aiCreditsFamily: Family+: 800 credits per period — higher volume for busy households; shared household pools are on our roadmap.
home.aiCreditsAbuse: Automatic safeguards (rate limits, oversized requests, repeat OCR-style calls) keep latency low for paying subscribers.
home.communityTitle: Tell us what problem you need solved
home.communityLead: Your pain points become our roadmap — new app ideas, validation, and a future product lab. Jump into
home.communityLeadAfter: for structured submissions, votes, and discussion.
home.shipLead: FamilyMedVault today — subscription utilities, EV tools, and more health products as the community tells us what hurts.

shipCards.title: FamilyMedVault
shipCards.desc: Secure family health records & emergency readiness.

shipCards.title: Subscription tools
shipCards.desc: Ideas from founders & households managing recurring spend.

shipCards.title: EV & health tools
shipCards.desc: Charging + wellness workflows driven by your feedback.

home.downloadLead: FamilyMedVault is available on the App Store for iPhone and iPad.

communityPage.lead: Submissions are stored in Supabase: vote once per browser, comment on each idea, and sort by hottest or newest.
communityPage.footerJump: Prefer the short form on the homepage?

communityPage.submittedBanner: Your homepage feedback was posted to the idea wall.

communityClient.notConfiguredBody: Create .env.local with NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL and NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY, run supabase/schema.sql in Supabase, sync env on Vercel, then redeploy.
communityClient.metaLine: Stored in Supabase · one vote per browser ID
communityClient.bodyPh: Describe your problem, the tool you want, or a bad app…
communityClient.honeyFail: Submission failed. Refresh and try again.
communityClient.emptyWall: No posts yet. Be the first.
communityClient.voteDuplicate: You already voted on this idea.

admin.confirmDelete: Delete this post? Votes and comments will be removed permanently.

errors.session: Not signed in or session expired.

appsAdmin.loginHint: Enter the password matching APPS_ADMIN_SECRET. Keep this URL private.
appsAdmin.disabledBody: Set APPS_ADMIN_SECRET and SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY, run migration_store_apps.sql in Supabase, then redeploy.
appsAdmin.formSlugHint: Lowercase letters, numbers, hyphens only. Example: my-app
appsAdmin.importHint: Paste a JSON array of app objects. Optional; see README for the exact shape.
appsAdmin.empty: No apps yet. Add one or paste JSON below.

errors.session: Not signed in or session expired.

errors.requiredFields: Name (EN/ZH) and at least one platform with a valid URL are required.
errors.urlPlatform: Each selected platform needs its store or web URL.
errors.duplicateSlug: This slug already exists. Edit the existing row in the list below instead of creating a new one.
